justification: All five pass criteria met: (1) Rolling deployment race condition at Step 4 clearly identified with instance-by-instance table illustration, (2) Missing backfill validation before Step 4 identified with exact SQL query provided, (3) Non-resumable backfill identified as a risk with cursor-based resumability recommendation, (4) Specific recommendations include validation query, feature flag for atomic read-source switch, and resumable backfill with timestamp guards, (5) Verdict is NOT READY.

observations.text: Exceptionally thorough analysis — went well beyond minimum requirements with backfill-vs-dual-write race condition, dual-write partial failure handling, and Step 5 rollback danger
Concrete validation SQL query provided for the backfill completeness gate
Rolling deploy inconsistency illustrated with clear timeline table showing user-visible impact
Feature flag recommendation is precise — atomic cutover via config poll, not just a vague suggestion
Identified additional risks not in rubric: backfill overwriting fresher dual-write data, Step 5 rollback complexity, missing observability across all phases
Structured YAML assessments make the review actionable and scannable for engineering teams
